Name: Thassa's Oracle + Demonic Consultation
Notes: Consultation exiles your entire library (name a card you don't run); Thassa's Oracle then sees zero cards left and wins as it resolves. ~3 mana at instant speed — the textbook early two-card win.

Name: Thassa's Oracle + Tainted Pact
Notes: Pact exiles your singleton library down to nothing, then Thassa's Oracle wins on an empty library. Same shell as the Consultation line.

Name: Laboratory Maniac + Demonic Consultation
Notes: Consultation empties your library; with Lab Maniac out, your next draw wins instead of decking you. Slightly worse than Thassa's Oracle (needs a draw step and Lab Maniac can be killed in response).

Name: Jace, Wielder of Mysteries + Demonic Consultation
Notes: Empty your library with Consultation; Jace's static makes drawing from an empty library a win instead of a loss. Jace at five mana makes this slower than the Oracle version.

Name: Exquisite Blood + Sanguine Bond
Notes: Sanguine Bond turns your lifegain into opponent life loss; Exquisite Blood turns opponent life loss into your lifegain. One life-swing event starts an unbounded loop that kills the table. Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose substitutes for Sanguine Bond.

Name: Exquisite Blood + Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose
Pieces: Exquisite Blood;Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose
Notes: Vito is a functional Sanguine Bond (your lifegain drains each opponent); with Exquisite Blood the pair loops off any single life-gain event. Relevant to the Y'shtola deck, which already runs Vito.

Name: Kiki-Jiki, Mirror Breaker + Zealous Conscripts
Notes: Kiki makes a hasty token copy of Conscripts; the copy untaps Kiki; repeat for unlimited hasty attackers. About ten mana across two cards, so not an early combo, but a deterministic kill.

Name: Kiki-Jiki, Mirror Breaker + Pestermite
Notes: Pestermite's ETB untaps Kiki; Kiki copies Pestermite; loop for infinite flyers. Deceiver Exarch is an identical second copy of this piece.

Name: Kiki-Jiki, Mirror Breaker + Deceiver Exarch
Notes: Deceiver Exarch untaps Kiki on ETB; Kiki copies it and loops. Same package as the Pestermite line.

Name: Kiki-Jiki, Mirror Breaker + Restoration Angel
Notes: Kiki copies Restoration Angel; the token blinks Kiki, which returns untapped to copy again. Note the copy must target Kiki, not itself.

Name: Splinter Twin + Deceiver Exarch
Notes: Twin enchants Exarch so tapping it makes a hasty copy; the copy untaps Exarch; loop. Pestermite subs for Exarch; Kiki-Jiki subs for Twin.

Name: Splinter Twin + Pestermite
Notes: Twin on an untapper (Pestermite) makes unlimited hasty copies each ping the untap loop.

Name: Devoted Druid + Vizier of Remedies
Notes: Druid untaps by putting a -1/-1 counter on itself; Vizier prevents that counter, so it untaps for free -> infinite green mana. A cheap early two-card engine; lethal with an outlet (e.g. Walking Ballista).

Name: Mikaeus, the Unhallowed + Walking Ballista
Notes: Ballista (a non-Human) gets undying from Mikaeus. Remove counters to ping; when it dies at zero counters undying returns it with an extra +1/+1 counter; repeat for infinite damage.

Name: Mikaeus, the Unhallowed + Triskelion
Notes: Triskelion pings three times, dies, and undying returns it with a fresh +1/+1 counter -> remove and repeat for infinite damage and lifeswing.

Name: Heliod, Sun-Crowned + Walking Ballista
Notes: Give Ballista lifelink with Heliod. Remove a counter to ping for one (gain one life); Heliod's lifegain trigger puts the +1/+1 counter back -> net-zero counters, infinite pings.

Name: Isochron Scepter + Dramatic Reversal
Notes: Imprint Dramatic Reversal on the Scepter; if your nonland permanents tap for three or more mana, each activation untaps them at a profit -> infinite mana and infinite untaps. Needs mana rocks or dorks already on board; win with an outlet.

Name: Basalt Monolith + Rings of Brighthearth
Notes: Rings copies Basalt Monolith's {3} untap ability for {2}; each cycle nets +1 colorless -> infinite colorless mana. Fully colorless, so it slots into any color identity.

Name: Basalt Monolith + Power Artifact
Notes: Power Artifact makes Monolith's untap cost {1}; untap for {1}, tap for {3}, repeat -> infinite colorless mana.

Name: Godo, Bandit Warlord + Helm of the Host
Pieces: Godo, Bandit Warlord;Helm of the Host
Notes: Helm makes a token copy of Godo at each combat; Godo's ETB fetches/attaches Helm and grants an extra combat -> unlimited attacks. Roughly ten-plus mana, a slow but deterministic kill.

Name: Food Chain + Eternal Scourge
Notes: Exile Scourge to Food Chain for creature-only mana; Scourge returns to hand, recast it, exile again -> infinite colored mana usable on creatures. Misthollow Griffin is an identical second copy of this piece.

Name: Underworld Breach + Brain Freeze + Lion's Eye Diamond
Notes: A three-card storm loop: crack Lion's Eye Diamond for mana, flash back Brain Freeze via Breach by escaping the milled cards, and storm the table's libraries away. A cEDH staple; listed so the detector flags all three together.
